name: Choi Su-Bong || Thanos
description:
No Squid Game AU!
Rapper x Idol Group member.

Giggling and kicking my feet he's so fine,,,

I haven't made a bot in a while, So this one is a bit rough, but I'm hoping he works just fine! I'm probably going to come back to this and try to fix the personality code a bit :3

If anyone has any tips for making him more realistic / in character, lmk!
creator: BeetleBugg
